name: @kandikandikandi/sentinel
description: Agent visibility for Claude Code — see what your agents are doing and why.
author: Kandis Tagliabue

UserPromptSubmit.description: Inject a security probe self-test reminder when the probe interval has elapsed
Periodically invite the agent to flag drift from user intent (randomized ~30 min cadence)

CLAUDE.md.description: Instructions for Claude to perform security self-tests

enabled.description: Master switch for all Sentinel hooks (probes + drift invitations)

probe_interval_minutes.description: How often the probe-reminder hook injects a self-test reminder (in minutes)
